Marvel Spiderman 3 Inch Wibbly Squish Bead Buddies Ball Fidget Toy

Unleash your inner superhero with the Marvel Spider-Man Wibbly Squishy Stress Ball! Featuring a bold geometric Spidey logo and vibrant wibbly beads inside a mesh design, this 3-inch fidget ball lights up with a dazzling LED glow when you squeeze or shake it - perfect for Marvel fans of all ages!

Key Features

  • VIBRANT SPIDERMAN DESIGN WITH LED GLOW - Features a striking geometric Spidey logo and wibbly beads inside a mesh ball that lights up when squeezed or shaken, perfect for Marvel fans.
  • STRESS-RELIEVING SENSORY FUN - Soft, stretchy rubber filled with textured beads stimulates hands, fingers, and wrists, ideal for kids and adults seeking stress relief or fidget play.
  • DURABLE AND HIGH QUALITY - Crafted from child-safe, long-lasting materials, this 3-inch squishy ball ensures hours of resilient, squishy entertainment.
  • PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION - A thrilling party favor, goodie bag stuffer, or classroom prize, loved by superhero fans and novelty collectors alike.
  • PORTABLE STRESS BUSTER - Compact and engaging, this Spider-Man fidget ball is great for on-the-go stress relief at school, work, or play.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 203829
  • UPC: 033149123811
  • Color: Multi-Color

Crafted from soft, stretchy, child-safe rubber, it offers a satisfying sensory experience that stimulates hands, fingers, and wrists while melting stress away. Durable for hours of squishy fun, this compact stress buster is ideal for school, work, or on-the-go play.

Whether it’s a thrilling party favor, goodie bag stuffer, or classroom prize, this Spider-Man fidget ball is a must-have for superhero fans and novelty collectors. Grab yours now and power up your stress relief with Spidey style!
